fields.name: Not Started
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of configuration tables that have not been started. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: In Progress
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of configuration tables that are in progress. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Completed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of configuration tables that have been completed. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Ignored
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of configuration tables that you have designated to be ignored. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Promoted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of configuration tables that have been promoted. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.
